name: Sage HR
description: HR management platform (formerly CakeHR) for employee records, leave management, and team organization.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sage HR
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > API
3. Click 'Enable API Access' to generate your API key
4. Enter your subdomain (from your Sage HR URL) and API key below

credentialFields.label: Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Sage HR subdomain. If your URL is https://acme.sage.hr, enter 'acme'.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Sage HR > Settings > Integrations > API > Enable API Access.

checks.name: Sage HR Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that employee records can be accessed via the Sage HR API.

checks.name: Sage HR Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that teams and positions are assigned to employees for role-based access controls.
